jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities.

 
 

 
 

 
 
 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Sales Associate (m/f/d) with 32h/week to join our dynamic team in our Prada Outlet in Roermond. As a Client Advisor (m/f/d), you will represent the Company towards customers and achieve the quantitative and qualitative objectives for the Department and the Store.

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Manage sales and optimize each step of the sales process.
 
 Understand the customer’s needs, both expressed and hidden.
 
 Present and value the product range.
 
 Boost cross-selling and additional sales.
 
 Ensure the correct management (cleaning, care, replacement) of the products in the department.
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 Passion for human relations and sales

 
 Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion, art and design

 
 Experience of building a long-lasting relationship with clients

 
 Being able to work in team as well as alone

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 
 Passion and knowledge of the managed product category

 
 Fluent spoken English expected

 
 
 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth.
Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.description:
Church’s is a luxury shoemaker of rich innovation and traditional excellence, anchored in an exceptional heritage of English craftsmanship. Established in Northampton in 1873, the brand’s expertise quickly earned recognition from its modest beginnings – from a small workshop in Northampton to global expansion. Its patronage was bestowed by HM Queen Elizabeth II in 1965. In 1999, the luxury house was acquired by Prada Group, a paradigm of artisanal excellence in its own right and the ideal ally to help the shoemaker take its brand to the next chapter. Reinventing the English roots and championing timeless craftsmanship and traditions: Church’s long-established innovation and authenticity remains paramount with unique designs across shoes and accessories for men and for women. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 To be the “ambassador” who convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world of the Brands. As such, to be responsible to maximize the individual and team sales, providing an extraordinary and memorable luxury customer experience placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships and developing their Brand loyalty. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Place the Customer at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”. 
 
 Capture Customer data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities. 
 
 Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset. 
 
 Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure a consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and inclusion values. 
 
 
 
 Welcome and serve the customer providing an excellent in-store experience at all times. 
 
 Be proactively engaged in cross selling with all Departments and maximizes sales opportunity in order to achieve individual sales target and KPIs. 
 
 Ensure to be up-to-date knowing fashion trends and competitors. 
 
 Prove Brand and product knowledge. 
 
 Deal effectively with customer complaints by liaising with the line manager when necessary. 
 
 Ensure and maintain the shop floor and visual display high standard, complying with Company operational guidelines and stock procedures. 
 
 Contribute to ensure a high level of security and is attentive to prevent product thefts. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Passion for selling and stores 

 
 Curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion, art and design 

 
 Experience of building a long-lasting relationship with clients 

 
 Being able to work in team as well as alone 

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills 

 
 Ambition, resilience, self motivation, result driven and problem solving 

 
 Passion and knowledge of the managed product category 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

Nel 1999, la casa di lusso è stata acquisita dal Gruppo Prada, paradigma di eccellenza artigianale a suo diritto e alleato ideale per aiutare il calzolaio a portare il suo marchio al prossimo capitolo. Riinventare le radici inglesi e valorizzare l'artigianato e le tradizioni senza tempo: l'innovazione e l'autenticità della Chiesa rimangono fondamentali con disegni unici tra scarpe e accessori per gli uomini e per le donne. ## Mansioni - Assicurarsi di essere up-to-date conoscere tendenze della moda e concorrenti. - Prove Brand e conoscenza del prodotto. - Affrontare efficacemente le lamentele dei clienti legandosi con il gestore di linea quando necessario. - Le Groupe, leader mondial du secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa et compte plus de 100 employés de nationalités. ## Mansioni ### BUSINESS - Assurer un accueil exceptionnel et un service à la clientèle, favorisant la vente croisée entre les catégories de produits. - Oui. jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 Leading the Business 

 
 
 Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store 
 
 Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance 
 
 Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories 

 
 
 
 Client Development 

 
 
 Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request 
 
 Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences 
 
 Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” 
 
 
 

 
 Team Management 

 
 
 Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client 
 
 Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics 
 
 Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates 
 
 Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures 
 
 
 

 
 Boutique Care 

 
 
 Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure 
 
 Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs 
 
 Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 
 

 
 At least 8 years of experience 

 
 Strong problem-solving and organizational skills 

 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions 

 
 Excellent communication skills and team spirit 

 
 Fluency in both Italian and English 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Fondata nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada è stato costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in più di 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e ha dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni ## Brand Store Manager Come Brand Store Manager, sei un ambasciatore appassionato del marchio e un leader aziendale, che trasmette la filosofia e i valori del marchio al mercato locale, al team del negozio e al cliente finale. ## Responsabilità - Leading the Business - Guidare il team del negozio a superare gli obiettivi finanziari e massimizzare le prestazioni di vendita, determinando il successo dell'intero negozio - Proporre e sviluppare piani d'azione, attraverso un'attenta analisi delle prestazioni - Guidare il team del negozio a superare i loro obiettivi KPI, inclusa la vendita incrociata e la vendita di prodotti tra categorie - Client Development - Mettere il cliente al di sopra di tutto, guidando con l'esempio per creare un ambiente accogliente e garantire che il team si impegni a soddisfare ogni esigenza e richiesta del cliente - Favorire una mentalità centrata sul cliente, sviluppando e mantenendo solide relazioni con i clienti e garantendo esperienze di vendita significative dopo la vendita - Garantire un'elevata soddisfazione del cliente e il massimo livello di servizio al cliente attraverso l'esecuzione della "Cerimonia di vendita del marchio" - Team Management - Agire da forte motivatore del personale, promuovendo lo spirito di squadra attraverso una comunicazione efficace e creando un ambiente positivo ed energetico, anche agli occhi del cliente - Incoraggiare la condivisione di informazioni all'interno del team e sviluppare proattivamente briefing mattutini su argomenti specifici - Padroneggiare tutti gli strumenti e le applicazioni aziendali, inclusi IT e digitali, e garantire che il team sia costantemente informato sugli aggiornamenti pertinenti - Comprendere le esigenze e le priorità, formare e ispirare il team del negozio sulla conoscenza del prodotto, sulle tecniche di vendita, sui servizi al cliente e sulle politiche e procedure aziendali - Boutique Care - Guidare con l'esempio per garantire che il team operi con il massimo livello di cura e rispetto per il prodotto, evidente in ogni cerimonia o procedura - Garantire che la vetrina attiri i clienti e massimizzi le vendite, in conformità con le linee guida aziendali - cercare proattivamente supporto da VM e MD in base alle esigenze del negozio - Fornire feedback e suggerimenti quando necessario ai dipartimenti di Visual Merchandising e Retail Merchandising ## Requisiti - Almeno 8 anni di esperienza - Forti capacità di problem-solving e organizzazione - Capacità di gestire multiple priorità e coordinare tra funzioni - Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e spirito di squadra - Fluente in entrambe le lingue italiana e inglese ## Cosa offriamo Unirsi alla nostra azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che attribuiamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, portando alla loro crescita professionale. Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal genere, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un luogo di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Gegründet 1913 in Italien, wurde die Prada Group auf einer Tradition von Exzellenz und mit einer Vision von Innovation aufgebaut. Die Gruppe, ein weltweiter Marktführer im Luxussegment, operiert in mehr als 45 Ländern mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa und beschäftigt Mitarbeiter aus über 100 Nationalitäten. ## Aufgaben ## Brand Store Manager Als Brand Store Manager sind Sie ein leidenschaftlicher Markenbotschafter und ein Unternehmensführer, der die Philosophie und die Werte der Marke an den lokalen Markt, das Store-Team und den Endkunden übermittelt. ## Verantwortlichkeiten - Leading the Business - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, die finanziellen Ziele zu übertreffen und die Verkaufsleistungen zu maximieren, um den Erfolg des gesamten Stores zu bestimmen - Aktionspläne vorschlagen und entwickeln, durch sorgfältige Analyse der Leistungen - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, ihre KPI-Ziele zu übertreffen, einschließlich Cross-Selling und Upselling zwischen Produktkategorien - Client Development - Den Kunden über alles stellen, indem Sie mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um eine einladende Umgebung zu schaffen und sicherzustellen, dass das Team sich bemüht, jede Notwendigkeit und Anfrage des Kunden zu erfüllen - Eine klientenzentrierte Denkweise fördern, indem Sie solide Kundenbeziehungen aufbauen und aufrechterhalten und sinnvolle Nachverkaufserfahrungen durchsetzen - Eine ausgezeichnete Kundenzufriedenheit und den höchsten Level an Kundenservice durch die Ausführung der "Markenverkaufszermonie" gewährleisten - Team Management - Als starker Mitarbeiter motivator fungieren, indem Sie Teamspirit durch effektive Kommunikation fördern und eine positive und energetische Umgebung schaffen, auch für die Kunden - Den Informationsaustausch innerhalb des Teams fördern und proaktiv Morgenbriefings zu spezifischen Themen entwickeln - Alle Unternehmenswerkzeuge und -anwendungen, einschließlich IT und digital, beherrschen und sicherstellen, dass das Team ständig über relevante Updates informiert ist - Die Bedürfnisse und Prioritäten verstehen, das Store-Team in Produktkenntnissen, Verkaufstechniken, Kundenservice und Unternehmensrichtlinien und -verfahren schulen und inspirieren - Boutique Care - Mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um sicherzustellen, dass das Team mit dem höchsten Level an Sorgfalt und Respekt für das Produkt arbeitet, offensichtlich in jeder Zeremonie oder Prozedur - Sicherstellen, dass die Schaufensterdekoration Kunden anzieht und den Verkauf maximiert, in Übereinstimmung mit Unternehmensrichtlinien - proaktiv VM- und MD-Unterstützung basierend auf den Bedürfnissen des Stores suchen - Feedback und Vorschläge geben, wenn notwendig, an die Abteilungen Visual Merchandising und Retail Merchandising ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 8 Jahre Erfahrung - Starke Problemlösungs- und Organisationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten und über Funktionen hinweg zu koordinieren - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Teamspirit - Fließend in beiden Sprachen, Italienisch und Englisch ## Was bieten wir Der Beitritt zu unserem Unternehmen bedeutet, in einer kreativen und internationalen Umgebung zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen, die durch Neugier und die Suche nach Exzellenz motiviert sind. Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und der Wert, den wir auf das Talent und die Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter legen, was zu ihrem eigenen beruflichen Wachstum führt. Die Prada Group fördert eine inklusive Arbeitsumgebung, die gleiche Chancen für alle Kandidaten gewährleistet, unabhängig von Geschlecht, Ethnizität, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist und verpflichten uns, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. ## Kontakt
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Fondée en 1913 en Italie, le Groupe Prada a été construit sur une tradition d'excellence et avec une vision de l'innovation. Le Groupe, un leader mondial dans le secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et compte des employés de plus de 100 nationalités. ## Missions ## Brand Store Manager En tant que Brand Store Manager, vous êtes un ambassadeur passionné de la marque et un leader d'entreprise, qui transmet la philosophie et les valeurs de la marque au marché local, à l'équipe du magasin et au client final. ## Responsabilités - Leading the Business - Diriger l'équipe du magasin pour dépasser les objectifs financiers et maximiser les performances de vente, en déterminant le succès de l'ensemble du magasin - Proposer et développer des plans d'action, à travers une analyse minutieuse des performances - Favoriser une mentalité centrée sur le client, en développant et en maintenant des relations solides avec les clients et en garantissant des expériences de vente significatives après-vente - Garantir une excellente satisfaction client et le plus haut niveau de service client à travers l'exécution de la "Cérémonie de vente de la marque" - Team Management - Agir en tant que motivateur fort du personnel, en promouvant l'esprit d'équipe à travers une communication efficace et en créant un environnement positif et énergétique, même aux yeux du client - Encourager l'échange d'informations au sein de l'équipe et développer de manière proactive des briefings matinaux sur des sujets spécifiques - Maîtriser tous les outils et applications de l'entreprise, y compris IT et numériques, et garantir que l'équipe est constamment informée des mises à jour pertinentes - Comprendre les besoins et les priorités, former et inspirer l'équipe du magasin sur la connaissance du produit, les techniques de vente, les services client et les politiques et procédures de l'entreprise - Boutique Care - Donner l'exemple pour garantir que l'équipe opère avec le plus haut niveau de soin et de respect pour le produit, évident dans chaque cérémonie ou procédure - Garantir que la vitrine attire les clients et maximise les ventes, conformément aux directives de l'entreprise - rechercher de manière proactive un soutien VM et MD en fonction des besoins du magasin - Fournir des commentaires et des suggestions lorsque nécessaire aux départements de Visual Merchandising et de Retail Merchandising ## Exigences - Au moins 8 ans d'expérience - Fortes compétences en résolution de problèmes et en organisation - Capacité à gérer de multiples priorités et à coordonner entre les fonctions - Excellentes compétences en communication et esprit d'équipe - Courant dans les deux langues, français et anglais ## Ce que nous offrons Rejoindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la quête de l'excellence. Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos employés, conduisant à leur propre croissance professionnelle. Le Groupe Prada promeut un environnement de travail inclusif, garantissant l'égalité des chances pour tous les candidats, quelle que soit leur sexe, leur origine ethnique, leur orientation sexuelle, leur handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à créer un lieu de travail équitable et respectueux pour tous. ## Contact

Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e ha dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni Come Client Advisor, garantisci una straordinaria e memorabile esperienza di cliente di lusso, ponendo il Cliente soprattutto, scoprendo le proprie esigenze e aspettative, promuovendo relazioni significative, servendo come Brand Ambassador. Voi trasmettete e promuovete la filosofia e i valori del marchio ai clienti finali che li guidano nel mondo dei nostri marchi. Si tiene conto di raggiungere il vostro obiettivo di vendita individuale e di squadra, che agisce come giocatore proattivo nel garantire il miglior servizio e rispondere alle esigenze del cliente sia in negozio che sul canale di ecommerce. ## Responsabilità - Agite come un vero e proprio ambasciatore di marca, sfruttando il tocco umano per creare un ambiente accogliente e stimolante che guidi il coinvolgimento del cliente e porti i valori del marchio alla vita; - Lavorare come team player e partner con colleghi, promuovere la comunicazione aperta e costruttiva, per garantire una costante esperienza eccezionale e contribuire a un ambiente di lavoro positivo, abbracciando i valori di Diversità e inclusione. - Abbracciare comportamenti di leadership dimostrando un atteggiamento positivo e la capacità di lavorare in team, mostrando adattabilità alle esigenze del business. - Posizionare il cliente al centro, creare un ambiente accogliente e sforzarsi di soddisfare le loro esigenze e richieste, fornendo loro un servizio di eccellenza in conformità alla “città di viaggio cliente”; - essere guidato per superare i singoli obiettivi di vendita e massimizzare le proprie prestazioni di vendita contribuendo al successo dell'intero negozio; - Essere guidato per superare gli obiettivi KPI, garantendo la massima qualità delle vendite e del servizio clienti; - Dimostrare una conoscenza eccellente delle tendenze dei prodotti così come i nostri marchi ## Requisiti - Passione per la costruzione di relazioni di lunga durata con clienti e colleghi - Problem solving, curiosità e interesse per il lusso / moda - L'esperienza in un ambiente di lusso o premium retail è un plus - Essere in grado di lavorare in team, così come da solo - Ottima comunicazione e competenze interpersonali - Fluent parlato inglese atteso ## Cosa offrendo la nostra azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e la ricerca di eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che mettiamo sul talento e sulla passione della nostra gente che porta alla propria crescita professionale. Prada Group promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal sesso, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un posto di lavoro giusto e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto (senza informazioni di contatto fornite)
descriptionByLocale.en: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE As Client Advisor, you guarantee an extraordinary and memorable luxury client experience, placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships, serving as a Brand Ambassador. You convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world our brands. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team sales target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the client needs both in store and on ecommerce channel. RESPONSIBILITIES Act as a true brand ambassador, leveraging the human touch to create a welcoming and inspiring environment that drives client engagement and brings the brand’s values to life; Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and Inclusion values. Embrace leadership behaviors demonstrating a positive attitude and ability to work in team, showing adaptability to the needs of the business. Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Passion for building long-lasting relationships with clients and peers Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion Experience in a luxury or premium retail environment is a plus Being able to work in team, as well as alone Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluent spoken English expected Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die 1913 in Italien gegründete Prada-Gruppe wurde auf einer Tradition der Exzellenz und mit einer Vision der Innovation aufgebaut. Mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa betreibt die Gruppe, ein Weltmarktführer im Luxussektor, in mehr als 45 Ländern und beschäftigt über 100 Nationalitäten. Als Kundenberater garantieren Sie ein außergewöhnliches und unvergessliches Luxus-Client-Erlebnis, das den Kunden vor allem aufgibt, seine Bedürfnisse und Erwartungen zu entdecken, sinnvolle Beziehungen zu fördern, die als Brand Ambassador dienen. Sie vermitteln und fördern die Markenphilosophie und Werte für die Endkunden, die sie in die Welt unserer Marken führen. Sie halten sich verantwortlich, um Ihr individuelles und Team-Verkaufsziel zu erreichen, als proaktiver Spieler, um den besten Service zu gewährleisten und auf die Kundenbedürfnisse sowohl im Store als auch im E-Commerce-Kanal zu reagieren. Responsabilità - Act as a true brand ambassador, nutzt den menschlichen Touch, um eine einladende und inspirierende Umgebung zu schaffen, die das Kundenengagement antreibt und die Werte der Marke zum Leben bringt; - Arbeiten Sie als Teamplayer und Partner mit Kollegen, fördern Sie offene und konstruktive Kommunikation, um eine konsequente außergewöhnliche Erfahrung zu gewährleisten und zu einem positiven Arbeitsumfeld beizutragen, um Diversity- und Inclusion-Werte zu nutzen. - Verkörpern Sie Führungsverhalten, die eine positive Einstellung und Fähigkeit, im Team zu arbeiten, zeigen Anpassungsfähigkeit an die Bedürfnisse des Unternehmens. CRM-Beratung und -Verwaltung von Kundendiensten Requisiti - Leidenschaft für den Aufbau langfristiger Beziehungen mit Kunden und Kollegen - Problemlösung, Neugier und Interesse an Luxus/Fashion - Erfahrung in einem Luxus- oder Premium-Einzelhandel-Umgebung ist ein Plus - In der Lage, im Team zu arbeiten, sowie allein - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikation und interpersonale Fähigkeiten - Flöte gesprochen Englisch erwartet Cosa offriamo Die Teilnahme an unserem Unternehmen bedeutet, in einem kreativen und internationalen Umfeld zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen von Interesse von Neugier und motiviert. Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und Wert, die wir auf das Talent und die Leidenschaft unserer Menschen setzen, die zu ihrem eigenen beruflichen Wachstum führen. Die Prada Group fördert ein inklusives Arbeitsumfeld, um Chancengleichheit für alle Kandidaten zu gewährleisten, unabhängig von Geschlecht, ethnischer Zugehörigkeit, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Eigenschaften. Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist und wir sind verpflichtet, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. Contatto (keine Kontaktinformationen)
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Fondé en 1913 en Italie, le groupe Prada a été construit sur une tradition d'excellence et avec une vision d'innovation. Le Groupe, leader mondial du secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et compte plus de 100 employés de nationalités. ## Mansioni En tant que conseiller client, vous garantissez une expérience client de luxe extraordinaire et mémorable, en plaçant le client avant tout, en découvrant leurs besoins et attentes, en favorisant des relations significatives, en servant comme ambassadeur de marque. Vous transmettez et faites la promotion de la philosophie et des valeurs de la marque aux clients finaux les guidant dans le monde de nos marques. Vous vous tenez responsable d'atteindre votre objectif de vente individuelle et d'équipe, agissant comme un acteur proactif pour assurer le meilleur service et répondre aux besoins du client à la fois en magasin et sur le canal de commerce électronique. ## Responsabilità - Agir en tant que véritable ambassadeur de marque, en tirant parti de la touche humaine pour créer un environnement accueillant et inspirant qui stimule l'engagement des clients et donne vie aux valeurs de la marque; - Travailler en tant que joueur d'équipe et partenaire avec ses collègues, favoriser une communication ouverte et constructive, assurer une expérience exceptionnelle cohérente et contribuer à un environnement de travail positif, en adoptant les valeurs de diversité et d'inclusion. - Embrassez des comportements de leadership démontrant une attitude positive et une capacité de travailler en équipe, montrant une capacité d'adaptation aux besoins de l'entreprise. - Mettre le Client au centre, créer un environnement accueillant et s'efforcer de répondre à tous leurs besoins et à toutes leurs demandes, en leur fournissant un service d'excellence conformément à la cérémonie du voyage client ; ## Requisiti - Passion pour l'établissement de relations durables avec les clients et les pairs - Résolution de problèmes, curiosité et intérêt pour le luxe / mode - Expérience dans un environnement de luxe ou de détail haut de gamme est un plus - Être capable de travailler en équipe, ainsi que seul - Excellente communication et compétences interpersonnelles - Anglais parlé fluide attendu ## Cosa offriamo Joindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la quête d'excellence. Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos gens qui mènent à leur propre développement professionnel. Prada Group favorise un milieu de travail inclusif, assurant l'égalité des chances pour tous les candidats, indépendamment du sexe, de l'origine ethnique, de l'orientation sexuelle, du handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous sommes déterminés à bâtir un milieu de travail juste et respectueux pour tous. ## Contatto (pas de coordonnées fournies)
